purpose: Independently compare admitted hybrid realization options, select native/minimally producer-assisted/missing-prerequisite disposition within this mode, and freeze separately intervenable state/history components plus their joint response before any hybrid runtime call.

entry_authority.owner_direction: Accept I03B/I03BR1 for staged progression and move to 8C next.
entry_authority.owner_direction_effect: Authorizes design-first P2-I2-I03C only; no discriminator-gate pass, I04, calibration, registration, scientific candidate, control result, or L02 conclusion.

bound_prior_artifacts.allowed_use: historical capability questions and dispositions only
fixed state-carried causal boundary and no-rewrite guard only
provenance and no-cross-mode-reuse guard only; fixture values and branch outcomes are forbidden I03C selection inputs
fixed history-carried causal/producer boundary and no-rewrite guard only
provenance and no-cross-mode-reuse guard only; fixture values and branch outcomes are forbidden I03C selection inputs
owner-review scope and acceptance-boundary provenance only
carry exact downstream obligations and no-cross-mode/no-fixture-reuse guards only

comparison_questions.question: Which exact state component C_P and active-history component H_P are separately causal, common, and independently intervenable rather than audit-only or controller-authored?
Can admitted public PyGRC machinery own both components and their joint read, or does active history still require the minimal I03B-class producer boundary?
Does one later response V read both state and history-derived output through a common non-private access path without source address, latest-contact authorization, or success field?
Can a state-only intervention change C_P/V while H_P and its output remain fixed?
Can a history-only intervention change H_P/readout/V while C_P remains fixed?
Can a joint contrast establish dependence on both components while state-only, history-only, arbitrary-label, private-mailbox, and direct-controller shortcuts remain distinguishable?
Which fields and transitions are active causal state/history inputs, audit-only lineage, admission/idempotency inputs, or forbidden controller information?
What common/private and alternate-access scopes preserve a genuinely joint pool read rather than contributor-addressed mailboxes?
Does native v2 plus any external adapter identity completely cover current/reset state, joint binding, interventions, save/load/reset, and equal-input continuation?
How do all seven logical cells, five L02 controls, OP-01..OP-09, I03BR1 obligations, and no-rewrite guards project into hybrid mode without selecting scientific values or ranking modes?

candidate_dispositions.admission_rule: Every state/history mutation, independently intervenable carrier, joint common read, later response, and restoration-relevant field is owned by admitted public PyGRC machinery; RCAE supplies declarative roles, orchestration, matching, and guards only.

PyGRC owns the native state carrier, native readout materialization mutations, joint feedback/producer path, and later transition, while one explicitly frozen RCAE producer supplies only the missing separable active-history carrier/readout operation without computing joint success.

No bounded native or separable producer-assisted realization can keep state and history independently causal/intervenable, combine them in one common native response, preserve private/access/restoration guards, and exclude controller shortcuts.

carried_i03br1_obligations: preserve unique registered source-to-P admission or add explicit route/channel key
bound lifecycle and event counts at I06
expose paired restoration as the only registered continuation interface with manifest hash validation
retain branch identity and isolation duties
mechanically reject every conformance fixture value and digest from I04/I06

design_phase_run_policy.source_comparison: static admitted source/dataflow plus pre-existing generic tests only

evidence_effect: design/source-comparison authority only; no realization is selected by this freeze and no implementation or scientific evidence is produced
